name: mcp-server
description: Connect your AI tools to your Gildara prompt vault. List, resolve, run, and create structured prompts with operating contracts, auto-repair, and variable substitution.

environment_variables.name: GILDARA_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your Gildara API key (pvk_...). Get one at https://gildara.io/account or via POST /api/v1/provision.

environment_variables.name: GILDARA_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Override the API base URL. Default: https://gildara.io

tools.name: list_prompts
tools.description: List all prompts in your vault with titles, IDs, categories, and contract status.

tools.name: get_prompt
tools.description: Get prompt details including content, variables, tags, and operating contract config.

tools.name: resolve_prompt
tools.description: Compile a prompt with operating contract sections assembled. Supports variable substitution and channel selection.

tools.name: run_prompt
tools.description: Run a prompt through AI with automatic JSON schema validation and auto-repair on failure.

tools.name: create_prompt
tools.description: Create a new prompt in your vault.

tools.name: list_blueprints
tools.description: Browse 12 pre-built agent blueprint templates for common workflows.
